title: Croatian Wrap
description: A delicious Croatian-inspired dish wrapped in a flavorful wrap. The bitter notes from the leaves balance out the richness of the molten cheese.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the Croatian Sausage (if using) and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Molten Cheese and stir until melted.
Add the Bitter Leafy Greens and cook until wilted.
Warm the Croatian Bread Wrap in the skillet for a few seconds.
Spoon the filling onto the wrap and top with Fresh Parsley.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
